requirement_topic.en: Radio functions and EMC compliance for wireless power bank and lithium battery systems
requirement_topic.zh: 含无线功能的移动电源和锂电系统的无线电与EMC合规
requirement_topic.zht: 含無線功能的行動電源和鋰電系統之無線電與EMC合規

summary.en: If the lithium product includes wireless transmission or short-range wireless control interfaces, Thai requirements include NBTC-type technical approval paths for radiocommunication functions in addition to the electrical safety route. Exporters must ensure the specific function triggers applicable NBTC conditions and provide Thai-facing test and filing material. For products without radio functions, EMC and safety-related product controls remain part of the TISI route under product category rules.
summary.zh: 如果锂电产品包含无线传输或短程无线控制接口，泰国要求可能包含NBTC无线电技术批准路径，除TISI安全规则外还需满足相应申请。出口商应确认具体功能对应的NBTC条件并提供泰国端测试和申报材料；无无线功能产品仍需在TISI品类规则下满足相应EMC及安全控制。
summary.zht: 如果鋰電產品包含無線傳輸或短程無線控制介面，泰國要求可能包含NBTC無線電技術批准路徑，除TISI安全規則外還需滿足相應申請。出口商應確認具體功能對應的NBTC條件並提供泰國端測試與申報材料；無無線功能產品仍需在TISI品類規則下滿足相應EMC及安全控制。

standards_or_laws: NBTC technical requirements under the National Broadcasting and Telecommunications framework
Telecommunications Acts and electronic radio type-approval conditions published by the National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission of Thailand
TISI safety framework coordination where radio-enabled products overlap with controlled electrical product categories

summary.en: China generally routes radio-device obligations through MIIT/SRRC and type-approval or filing requirements for relevant communication functions, while lithium battery safety remains under GB/T 31241 and related standards. CCC may apply in separate categories for domestic Chinese sales. These are not automatically transferable to Thailand NBTC obligations for import placement.
summary.zh: 中国一般将无线功能义务通过工信部/SRRC体系与相关通信功能的型号核准或备案路径处理，同时锂电池安全仍按GB/T 31241等标准执行。部分类别在国内销售还可能涉及CCC，但不能直接转换为泰国NBTC的入市要求。
summary.zht: 中國一般將無線功能義務透過工信部/SRRC體系與相關通訊功能的型號核准或備案路徑處理，同時鋰電池安全仍按GB/T 31241等標準執行。部分類別在國內銷售還可能涉及CCC，但不能直接轉換為泰國NBTC的入市要求。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/SRRC administrative filing or approval rules for radio devices
GB 9254-2017 / related EMC-related electrical test frameworks for applicable categories

gap.en: A major gap is that Thai wireless-enabled models often require NBTC filing and clearance conditions even where CN domestic filings are present. The NBTC path is triggered by function, not by battery chemistry alone. Exporters should map each SKU's radio feature matrix before shipment and ensure local filing responsibility sits with the Thai importer/licence holder.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于，具有无线功能的型号在泰国可能仍需NBTC申报和清关条件，即使已有中国境内相关备案。NBTC触发点是功能而非电芯化学体系。出口商应先梳理每个SKU的无线功能清单，并确保由泰国进口商/许可持有人承担本地申报责任。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於，具有無線功能的型號在泰國可能仍需NBTC申報和清關條件，即使已有中國境內相關備案。NBTC觸發點是功能而非電芯化學體系。出口商應先梳理每個SKU的無線功能清單，並確保由泰國進口商/許可持有人承擔本地申報責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for products with radio features in Thailand. Absent wireless/transmitting functions, this row is conditional rather than universally mandatory.
mandatory_status.cn: Radio function filing in China follows MIIT/SRRC pathways and is not equivalent to a Thai NBTC placement condition.

source.publisher: National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission of Thailand (NBTC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For any lithium battery product with wireless interfaces, validate whether NBTC applies before shipment. CN radio testing and GB/CCC evidence are often useful technically, but does not automatically satisfy Thailand filing logic.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于任何含无线界面的锂电产品，出运前需确认是否触发NBTC要求。中国境内的无线测试和GB/CCC证据可作为技术参考，但通常不能直接满足泰国入市申报逻辑。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於任何含無線介面的鋰電產品，出運前需確認是否觸發NBTC要求。中國境內的無線測試和GB/CCC證據可作為技術參考，但通常不能直接滿足泰國入市申報邏輯。
